title: sedum aizoon var. austromanshuricum
intro: Sedum aizoon var. austromanshuricum, also known as the Korean Sedum or Autumn Joy, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Crassulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Sedum aizoon var. austromanshuricum can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by steeping the plant in a solvent, and can also be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
